name: Wolkenkraft FX Mini Ultra
summary: A pocket-sized convection vaporiser with full temperature control, for patients who want discreet, portable dosing.
description: The Wolkenkraft FX Mini Ultra packs true convection heating into a small body, heating up in under 30 seconds. Temperature is adjustable from 160 to 221C on an OLED display, with a memory function, a session mode that steps the heat through a session, and a stealth mode for discreet use. The 1600mAh battery charges over USB-C and covers several sessions per charge. Trade-off is the smaller battery against the larger Aris, but for patients who prioritise pocketability with convection quality, it earns its place; five-year warranty included.
